Button.base: relative overflow-hidden font-orbitron uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300

variants.secondary: bg-transparent text-white/70 border border-white/10 hover:text-white hover:border-white/30

Card.base: bg-[#0A0A0F]/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#00F0FF]/10 p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#00F0FF]/30 transition-colors duration-500

Input.base: bg-black/50 border-b border-[#00F0FF]/30 text-[#00F0FF] font-mono focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none placeholder:text-[#00F0FF]/30 rounded-none px-4 py-3

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import link to the <head> of public/index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (void, obsidian, neon_blue) and fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani).
3. GLOBAL CSS: Update index.css to set the default background to 'void' (#020204) and text to 'text_primary'. Add a global 'scanline' overlay using ::after on the body.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: Do not use default Shadcn styles. Override them with the 'futuristic' variants defined in 'components'. Remove rounded corners (rounded-none) for a technical look.
5. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' for the dashboard. Create a 'Sidebar' that looks like a HUD panel (left side) and a 'Main Content' area that feels like a viewport.
6. VOICE INTERFACE: The central element should be the 'Arc Reactor' or 'AI Orb' (use the ai_avatar image or a CSS/Framer Motion animation). It must pulse when 'listening' or 'speaking'.
7. CHAT INTERFACE: Messages should look like data logs. User messages aligned right (Green/Cyan), AI messages aligned left (Blue/White). Use JetBrains Mono for code blocks.
8. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add sound effects (optional but recommended) or visual cues (borders glowing) on hover/click.
9. DO NOT use white backgrounds anywhere. The app must be strictly Dark Mode.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
